response.justification: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack engineer with 11+ years of experience and explicit AI agent infrastructure expertise—a key requirement. Demonstrates software craftsmanship and testing culture throughout career. Some specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, GCP/Azure) require verification, but foundational skills are solid and learning curve would be minimal.
strengths: Direct AI agent/MCP infrastructure experience in current role with TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise
Extensive full-stack background across web, mobile, and embedded systems with strong architecture skills
Proven commitment to engineering excellence through TDD, refactoring practices, and mentoring culture
concerns: Key frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned in recent work history
Cloud platform experience shows AWS focus; GCP and Azure experience unclear
Database experience emphasizes MongoDB; PostgreSQL and relational database depth not evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure & core stack alignment
